objectives.text: Speak with Susanna Fontana at the water court.
Inspect the throttled condenser with Noa Faber.
Hear the Compact, Morrow, resident, and Cassian proposals.
Trace the buried pulse through the closed work areas.
Resolve the Intake Clerk beneath the water court.
Choose how South Measure will move water.
Decide custody of the original household roll.

stages.task: Speak with Susanna Fontana at the water court
stages.description: South Measure’s water queue blocks the northern wagon lane. Noa throttled the condenser after a buried pulse reached the taps.

stages.task: Inspect the throttled condenser with Noa Faber
stages.description: The machine can carry more water. Noa wants the pulse beneath it understood before anyone opens the feed.
The Compact, the Morrow Chain, resident mechanics, and Brother Cassian offer different ways to manage the buried signal and the short water line.
The clinic monitor, freight routes, relief drain, and intake undercroft each reveal part of the water decision.
The body beneath the admission booth answers the Hallowfen rhythm through the old feed.
South Measure can accept monitored full flow, imported rations, an isolated local loop, or emergency closure.
The operating plan leaves the pump keys and maintenance burden unresolved. Outside claims still wait at the council table.

stages.task: Decide custody of the original roll
stages.description: The household roll can protect water rights, expose private residents, or preserve old debts.
Noa has a northern school place. Her family’s status determines whether she can use it.
Cassian heard an answer through the intake pipe. Decide where he carries that warning.
South Measure must hear the water settlement and any unresolved danger before the chain rises.
The chain is raised. Susanna’s signed water abstract will carry the settlement beyond South Measure.
South Measure has named its water terms and opened the north chain.
